demo-shared.nav.title: Demo navigation
demo-shared.nav.hint: Hover a "prefetched" link, wait a beat, then click — the destination renders instantly. The non-prefetched siblings show the cold load for contrast.
demo-shared.errors.title: Error scenarios
demo-shared.errors.hint: Each button navigates to a sub-route that triggers the matching foundation error surface. On the with-suspense page the boundary catches the throw and renders <ApiErrorState> as a full page replacement; on the without-suspense page the page reads the URL token and renders the same component inline.
demo-shared.withSuspense.title: With Suspense — page-level demo
demo-shared.withSuspense.subtitle: Three parallel reads against /user, /memberships, /zones?account.id=… wrapped in a single <ApiSuspense>. `data` is always defined inside the page body — no isLoading, no error branch.
demo-shared.withSuspense.noAccount: No account in the URL. Visit this page under /:accountId/demo/with-suspense.
demo-shared.withoutSuspense.title: Without Suspense — page-level demo
demo-shared.withoutSuspense.subtitle: Same three reads against /user, /memberships, /zones?account.id=… via useApiQueries. The page itself branches on isPending / isError / data and renders <ApiErrorState> inline for failures.
demo-shared.withoutSuspense.error: Something went wrong loading this section.
demo-shared.withoutSuspense.noAccount: No account in the URL. Visit this page under /:accountId/demo/without-suspense.
demo-shared.zones.empty: No zones in this account yet.
